title: cat mouths spring 08
label: self-released
body:
Spring 2008 recording folder. All M4A format, characteristic of the earliest recording period. Track titles show the distinctively absurdist-scientific naming style Colin used from the start.

## Confirmed tracks (from archive filenames)

1. molecules disco disco disco.m4a
2. manipulative squid bodies in your body.m4a
3. knuckles in your stomach (anxious anxious).m4a
4. super super.m4a
9. astral bathroom (haircut experience).m4a
- like...whoa..m4a
- para-sympathetic nervous system (giraffe legs episodes).m4a

## Notes

Track numbering suggests this is a 9+ track collection (track 9 confirmed). Track titles anticipate themes that recur throughout the discography: body-horror imagery ("manipulative squid bodies in your body," "knuckles in your stomach"), scientific terminology used poetically ("para-sympathetic nervous system"), and animal references ("giraffe legs"). "anxious anxious" double-word is a Colin verbal tic seen in later releases.
